name: Phase N5 Multi-Module Event Router Skeleton

value.creative_brief: A modern co-working space banner with glassmorphism effects

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_id": "{{ $json.request_id }}",
  "event_type": "COMFYUI_GENERATION_REQUESTED",
  "correlation_id": "c92a7e2b-f11a-4bc2-812d-98ba29a28e3b",
  "brand_id": "{{ $json.brand_id }}",
  "campaign_id": "{{ $json.campaign_id }}",
  "job_id": "job_demo_001",
  "module_name": "creative_asset_comfyui",
  "callback_url": "{{ $json.callback_url }}",
  "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "payload": {{ JSON.stringify($json.payload) }},
  "safety": {
    "requires_approval": true,
    "final_approval_granted": true,
    "allow_real_world_action": true,
    "allow_auto_publish": false,
    "allow_ads_spend": false,
    "allow_customer_messaging": false
  }
}
